title: crotalaria sagittalis
intro: Crotalaria sagittalis, also known as the arrowhead crotalaria, is a plant species in the legume family native to tropical Africa. The plant's seeds and roots have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Crotalaria sagittalis include its potential to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to act as an antiseptic and wound healer. The plant's herbal preparations can be made into teas, infusions, or poultices, and its seeds are sometimes used in traditional African medicine to treat a range of ailments.
